gallery.caption: Me chilling in the infinity pool at Marina Bay Sands, Singapore.
People enjoying the infinity pool at the top of Marina Bay Sands
After a day exploring the city of Singapore, I found my way to the top of the Marina Bay Sands Hotel for a drink. I couldn’t have asked for a better view.
View of Marina Bay in Singapore featuring the iconic skyline and modern waterfront architecture, captured at sunset with warm light reflecting on the bay. Travel and cityscape photography.
Landscape view of the Infinity Pool at Marina Bay Sands, Singapore.

marina-bay-sands.credit: Photo by Victor He on Unsplash
